Package com.nexacro.java.xapi.tx.impl

  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    MiBinaryDataDeserializer
    read defined Binary type data(stream) from InputStream to MiPlatform, and transform it to PlatformData.
    MiBinaryDataSerializer
    transform PlatformData to defined Binary type from MiPlatform and output withOutputStream.
    MiXmlDataDeserializer
    read XML type data(stream) defined in MiPlatform from InputStream or Reader, and transform with PlatformData.
    MiXmlDataSerializer
    transform PlatformData to XML type defined in MiPlatform and output with OutputStream or Writer.
    PlatformBinaryDataDeserializer
    read defined Binary type data(stream) from InputStream in nexacro platform, and transform to PlatformData.
    PlatformBinaryDataSerializer
    transform PlatformData to Binary type defined in nexacro platform and output with OutputStream.
    PlatformBinaryJavaTypeDataSerializer
    transform Variable and DataSet to Binary type defined in nexacro platform and output with OutputStream.
    PlatformBinaryPartDataSerializer
    transform Variable and DataSet to Binary type defined in nexacro platform and output with OutputStream.
    PlatformHtmlDataSerializer
    transform PlatformData to HTML type defined in nexacro platform and output withOutputStream or Writer.
    PlatformJsonDataDeserializer
    read JSON type data(stream) defined in nexacro platform from InputStream, and transformed to PlatformData.
    PlatformJsonDataSerializer
    transform PlatformData to JSON type defined in nexacro platform and output with OutputStream.
    PlatformSsvDataDeserializer
    read SSV type data(stream) defined in nexacro platform from InputStream, and transformed to PlatformData.
    PlatformSsvDataSerializer
    transform PlatformData to SSV type defined in nexacro platform and output with OutputStream.
    PlatformSsvPartDataSerializer
    transform Variable and DataSet to SSV type defined in nexacro platform and output with OutputStream or Writer.
    PlatformXmlDataDeserializer
    read XML type data(stream) defined in nexacro platform from InputStream or Reader, and transform to PlatformData.
    PlatformXmlDataSerializer
    transform PlatformData to XML type defined in nexacro platform and output with OutputStream or Writer.
    PlatformXmlJavaTypeDataSerializer
    transform Variable and DataSet to XML type defined in nexacro platform and output with OutputStream or Writer.
    PlatformXmlPartDataSerializer
    transform Variable and DataSet to XML type defined in nexacro platform and output with OutputStream or Writer.
    PlatformZlibByteDecoder
    compressed data(stream) read from InputStream is decompressed by ZLIB method.
    PlatformZlibByteEncoder
    Compress data(stream) from OutputStream by ZLIB method and output.
